title: Beyond the Curtain
writer: John Cresswell, Compton Bennett, John Harlow
actors: Richard Greene, Eva Bartok, Marius Goring
plot: East German refugee Karin finds herself back at home in Dresden when the flight on which she is stewardess, between Berlin and the West, is forced down. She is then used by the State police to find her wanted brother, so when coll...
